programme.title: Autour du monde : le journal[Live]
programme.desc: Les informations qui font la une aux quatre coins du monde sont décryptées à travers des reportages, des analyses approfondies et le travail de correspondants internationaux. Un regard global et complet sur l'actualité pour mieux comprendre les événements qui façonnent notre époque.

programme.title: E403 - The Crew Builds A Pirate Ship Cafe / The Crew Builds A Sierra Sparkle Exper
programme.desc: When Cafe Carl's pirate-themed restaurant gets caught in rough waters, the pups set sail with a new construction solution. // Sierra Sparkle calls in help from Rubble & Crew to build a special experience for all her fans in Builder Cove.

programme.title: E107 - Treasure / Roar / Mammoth
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy, Tia and Grandma go on the search for treasure. // It's the Roar Festival, and Tim wants to have the best Roar in town. // Tim, Tommy and Tia find a lost mammoth in their house.

programme.title: E109 - Elf School / The Royal Golf Course
programme.desc: Holly joins Ben at Elf School, where no magic should be used. Holly finds it hard until Nanny Plum uses magic to help her out. // A mole disturbs King Thistle's golf course, so a Gnome helps drive it away. Soon the Gnome is ordering the Elves around.

programme.title: E113 - The Crew Builds A Dinosaur Museum / The Crew Builds A Wheelchair Ramp
programme.desc: After uncovering dinosaur bones, the pups decide to build a dinosaur museum! // When Omar the Mail Carrier breaks his foot, it's up to the pups to make sure he can still deliver the mail by building ramps all over town.

programme.title: E112 - Costume Croc / Plant Sitter Croc
programme.desc: Mr. Crocodile dresses as Super Crocodile for his first Halloween, and tries to live up to his new identity. // Daisy and Mr. Crocodile promise to take care of Mrs. Flores' prized plant, but keep putting it off for 'later'.

programme.title: E425 - Edmond Elephant's Birthday
programme.desc: Peppa and her friends go to help at Edmond Elephant's birthday party, but the little children are harder to look after than they expected.

programme.title: E204 - The Floor Is Guava / We Are The Grumples
programme.desc: Boots wants to enjoy Banana Fest, but the Guava Geyser is erupting! Dora needs to stop the geyser and save the festival. / It's Picture Day, but the Grumpy Old Troll runs away! Dora follows him into Troll World to get him to come out for the picture.

programme.title: E109 - Elf School / The Royal Golf Course
programme.desc: Holly joins Ben at Elf School, where no magic should be used. Holly finds it hard until Nanny Plum uses magic to help her out. // A mole disturbs King Thistle's golf course, so a Gnome helps drive it away. Soon the Gnome is ordering the Elves around.

programme.title: E110 - Double Dare You / Roy
programme.desc: On a ski trip, the Barbapapas build a giant igloo. Barbabravo and Barbalib challenge each other to find out who is braver. // Barbabright creates a vacuuming robot that's also very good at soccer. The Barbababies organise a match against the robots.

programme.title: E104 - Tool Duel
programme.desc: Gabby is the mechanic all the Monster Machines in town count on to fix them up. But when Crusher steals all her tools, Gabby needs Blaze's help to get them back!

programme.title: E108 - Prizes
programme.desc: After losing again and again, Tia tries to win every party game.

programme.title: E248 - Bouncy Ball
programme.desc: Peppa and George are playing in the garden with their bouncy ball when Suzy Sheep turns up with two tennis rackets. She uses the bouncy ball to play a game of tennis with Peppa, making George feel left out. Will the job of ball boy cheer him up?

programme.title: E626 - Pups Save A Tour Bus / Pups Save Midnight At The Museum
programme.desc: Mayor Humdinger's tour bus goes out of control when he tries to bring tourists to Foggy Bottom! PAW Patrol to the rescue! // A fun museum sleepover is interrupted when Alex and the mini-patrol go missing, and Mayor Goodway gets stranded on a T-Rex!

programme.title: E202 - Cookies
programme.desc: Tim gets the best cookies in town but soon finds that others need them more than him.

programme.title: E514 - Kylie Kangeroo
programme.desc: Peppa and George meet Kylie Kangaroo and her brother Joey. Peppa shows Kylie how to jump up and down in muddy puddles, but who can jump the highest?

programme.title: E30
programme.desc: Hiiragi Kanade (Fukuchi Momoko) arrives in Noto as a volunteer and unexpectedly ends up launching a community radio station with the local residents. But there's no experience, no budget, and no studio - only a shared desire to bring light back to a town hurt by earthquakes and torrential rain. Once the broadcast begins, there's no turning back. A nonstop entertainment drama where ordinary citizens find themselves becoming stars.

E1 - Rain
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'rain' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure. Today's episode is all about rain!

programme.title: E12 - The Waiting Badge
programme.desc: When they're accidentally shut in the shed, Duggee shows the Squirrels how to make the time pass with calm breathing and made-up games. The Squirrels cope so well. Does Duggee?

programme.title: E26 - El Gran Final
programme.desc: Join the chickens in space for the big finale of Agony and Eggstacy! Mucho Suspense!

programme.title: E12 - Bob Bilby
programme.desc: When it's Bingo's turn to bring her Kindy's Bob Bilby puppet home and record their weekend in the scrapbook, the family resolve to show him a good time.

programme.title: E15 - Trains
programme.desc: All aboard the Dad Train! Bingo goes from home to daycare to her job at the vet every morning, but there's trouble on the line as a mischievous Bluey throws everyone off schedule.

programme.title: E31 - Onesies
programme.desc: When mum's sister Brandy comes over for a visit, she brings the kids onesies as a present, which has an unexpected effect on Bingo.

programme.title: E2 - Cup
programme.desc: Bella plays with her favourite cup - it makes the perfect drum for a sing along with Lift. Together, they visit Kingsley and Queenie who play the 'Tea Party Dash', but who will win?

programme.title: E38 - The Dressing Up Badge
programme.desc: Duggee is wrapping a present because it is Enid's birthday. But the squirrels didn't get her anything!

programme.title: E50 - Horsetail Fall, California
programme.desc: The team are at Horsetail Fall in the Yosemite Nation Park to watch the 300m high waterfall become Firefall. Can the team save snowy Princess Glorinda and Firefall at the Yosemite National park?

programme.title: E49 - Go Jet Academy: Global Gameshow
programme.desc: It's the Go Jetters as you've never seen them before as they take part in a disco dazzling around the world gameshow!

programme.title: E37 - Pond Prose
programme.desc: Sarah is inspired by listening to a poetry record and decides to make up some poetry of her own.

programme.title: E51 - Wonder Vole
programme.desc: Benjamin can't find his favourite toy, Wonder Vole anywhere. Stanley suggests they retrace his steps but have no luck. Maybe Wonder Vole Pyjamas will help Benjamin feel brave.

programme.title: E14 - Perfect
programme.desc: For her Father's Day card, Bluey sets out to draw a picture of herself and her father together. While recalling her favourite memories of playing with Bandit, Bluey struggles with the idea that her drawing must be perfect. Chilli tries to convince Bluey that perfection isn't easy, or absolutely necessary.

programme.title: E15 - Explorers
programme.desc: While waiting to be picked up from school, Jack plays at being a sailor trying to find his way back home to Australia. Meanwhile, Jack's Dad has got lost on route to collect him.

programme.title: E8 - Okra
programme.desc: It's the spectacular music duo, Okra, playing the floor piano together in perfect sync.

programme.title: E7 - Asparagus
programme.desc: Asparagus shares his deep affection for wet weather in the song 'I Love The Rain'.

programme.title: E2 - A Big Day of Games & Fun!
programme.desc: Get ready for a big day of discovery & play with Twinkle & her friends! The fun starts as they learn to play new musical instruments, with Twinkle on drums, Kitty on the sax & Bunny on guitar! Then, it's time to play a fun game of 'Twinkle Says'! Follow along as they give you playful instructions & see if you can keep up. The discoveries continue as the friends find a mirror & make funny faces & wonder what an umbrella is for before it starts to rain!

programme.title: E3 - Songs About Feeling Good & Staying Safe!
programme.desc: Join Kii & Yii for songs about feeling good & staying safe! First, learn the best way to get a healthy smile in a fun & educational song about how to brush your teeth properly. Then, learn how to be safe when you're riding a bike at the playground. The lessons continue as Kii & Yii sing about being kind to each other, especially when a friend is sick. From learning colors to singing a soothing lullaby, these songs will make you feel good!

programme.title: E17 - JJ's Active Adventures & Fun!
programme.desc: It's time to move & groove with JJ's active adventures! Ms. Appleberry teaches the importance of stretching & exercise. Then, JJ learns Taekwondo & earns his first belt! The active fun continues as the kids learn to tap dance & play on the jungle gym. Plus, join JJ & his family for a super fun beach day, making sandcastles & playing in the sea, & an exciting backyard camping trip!

programme.title: E2 - Zero Gravity, Shrink Rays & More Mayhem!
programme.desc: Get ready for some sci-fi mayhem with Arpo & Baby Daniel! The chaos begins when Daniel accidentally switches Arpo to zero-gravity mode, causing the robot & everything he touches to float around the city! Then, Arpo accidentally shrinks Baby Daniel with a shrink ray & has to search frantically for the tiny toddler. The out-of-this-world adventure continues when the pesky squirrel takes Daniel on an unexpected trip to outer space in a make-believe rocket!

programme.title: E1 - Mom's Crazy Inventions Go Haywire!
programme.desc: Mom's crazy inventions are going haywire! First, Arpo & Daniel have fun with the new voice-controlled smart house, until it starts having a tantrum & they have to figure out how to calm it down. Then, Mom's new time travel machine accidentally turns a pigeon into a giant pterodactyl, forcing Arpo to catch it! The mayhem continues when Daniel takes a flying smartcrib on a joyride & Arpo has to chase a remote-controlled truck that's gone out of control!

programme.title: E2 - A Big Day of Teamwork & Fixes!
programme.desc: It's a big day of teamwork & fixes at Gecko's Garage! When the Mechanicals accidentally injure Gecko's foot, they must learn the value of teamwork to finish repairing Bobby the Bus by themselves. Then, when Green Mechanical gets stressed, Gecko teaches her mindfulness tips to calm down. The teamwork continues as Gecko helps his rival, Mr. Weasel, fix an engine with a clean electric one, & the whole crew works together to repair Trevor the Tractor's giant gears!

programme.title: E5 - Super Creative Day of Play
programme.desc: Get ready for a super creative day of play with Twinkle! First, it's time to get musical! Each toadstool makes a different musical note, allowing Twinkle & Sandy the Seagull to create a musical tune. Then, get creative as Twinkle has fun painting a picture of what she sees. The fun continues as Twinkle shares a box full of super fun toys, & her friends learn how to play new musical instruments!

programme.title: E3 - Songs About Feeling Good & Staying Safe!
programme.desc: Join Kii & Yii for songs about feeling good & staying safe! First, learn the best way to get a healthy smile in a fun & educational song about how to brush your teeth properly. programme.title: BODIES AT REST
programme.desc: A cat-and-mouse game unfolds over a single night when three armed criminals barge into a morgue, demanding the forensic doctor and his assistant to hand over a bullet lodged inside a corpse. While the criminals are in a desperate attempt to hide their true identities, the doctor finds himself sinking deeper and deeper into a quagmire as his past inadvertently catches up with him. Each explosive twist soon pushes the characters beyond their limits.

programme.title: Look For A Star
programme.desc: It's hardly a coincidence that Sam is considered the most eligible bachelor in town. Not only is he a young, smart, and insightful entrepreneur with a coveted fortune, but he also happens to be a blithe spirit with a carefree attitude to life. However, every success has its price. Sam has already divorced three times and finds himself crawling back to the game of love sooner than he has expected. It is love at first sight when Sam chances upon a feisty, fast-talking woman with the odd name of Milan at a Macau casino. But the catch is, she is a part-time poker dealer and a full-time cabaret dancer, “careers” not exactly congruent with his station in life. Fallen in love against all odds, this mismatched couple soon makes headline in all media which turn Milan into an It girl overnight...

programme.title: Ghost Cat Anzu
programme.desc: Karin, 11 years old, finds herself abandoned by her father in a small Japanese town, where her grandfather, a monk, resides. Her grandfather asks Anzu, his jovial and helpful, although rather capricious, ghost cat, to look after her. As their spirited personalities collide, sparks fly-yet perhaps only in the beginning.

programme.title: Hand Rolled Cigarette
programme.desc: Former Hong Kong Military Service Corps officer becomes caught in a triad manhunt when he takes in an ethnic South Asian man carrying a bag of stolen drugs. Forced to live under the same roof, the two men transcend their cultural and racial differences to form a beautiful friendship in this poignant tale of loyalty and brotherhood.

programme.title: Veranica Tchalabaeva: Winning Poodle Squad
programme.desc: The GUINNESS WORLD RECORDS title for the most times a dog passes through a roller pushed by a dog in one minute is held by Veranica Tchalabaeva and her dogs. Veranica shares the basics of dog training and what it takes to become the best in the world.

programme.title: Engineering Space
programme.desc: To send rockets to outer space, it requires all types of engineers. From building rocket engines using 3D printing to creating autonomous robots that will explore Mars, we'll look at a variety of exciting careers.

programme.title: Hall of Fame
programme.desc: Ian goes to the Video Game Hall of Fame. Back at the garage, Jesse and Julia stretch the meaning of “Hall of Fame” to the limits.

programme.title: A Mysterious Lump
programme.desc: The Junior Vets are trying to get to the bottom of Benji the dog's painful pee problem. And Gary, the axolotl, arrives at Vet School with a mysterious lump. Can the Junior Vets work out what's wrong?

programme.title: Day of the Time Machine
programme.desc: Ricky plays with a time machine app and wishes he could go back in time after spilling paint on a priceless rug. He meets Gaudi to make a salt dough lizard and also learns how to create wings for his shoes.

programme.title: Back on the Road
programme.desc: The Icicles are taking a huge risk and have choreographed a very ambitious routine. Charlie and Freddie are off to a competition in Guildford via Grandma's house for a sleepover. And a talented young skater from Russia has got everyone in a spin.

programme.title: Trip to Jordan
programme.desc: Zoe and Milo clash over their school show poster-Zoe colors while Milo writes the title. Alim suggests writing from the right, surprising them. In Jordan, they meet Souria preparing a puppet show and learn to write Arabic... from right to left!

programme.title: The Wonders of DNA
programme.desc: Why do you look so much like your siblings? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of genetics. Have hands-on fun by extracting some of your DNA, and get to know Joe Hin Tjio, the first person to find the exact number of chromosomes in the human body.

programme.title: Panda and Macaw
programme.desc: Posse, the red panda, and Santiago, the saki, have been having issues with their teeth and the dentist brought his big pliers! Ever heard the tale of how the blue-throated macaw parrot was saved from extinction and started a new fashion trend in the process?

programme.title: The Mystery of the Shrinking Rink
programme.desc: Addison's plans for a local version of the winter Olympics are in jeopardy unless she can figure out why their outdoor ice skating rink keeps mysteriously melting and running away.

programme.title: The Mystery of the Birthday Brainteaser
programme.desc: Addison fears that her family and friends have forgotten her birthday, so instead takes consolation in trying to solve a series of mysterious clues that take her on a wild goose chase all over Ayrton Park.

programme.title: Plastic Spoon
programme.desc: Hepi and Briko reuse spoons to make some cute DIY's.

programme.title: Sibling Love
programme.desc: Bhilka wakes up to a terrible noise. DiktaThor and Cleopatra are fighting for power. Sprinter is on the case, both saving the city and creating peace between the two villains, who turn out to be nothing less than sibling rivalry!

programme.title: The Spring
programme.desc: The well in the woods needs cleaning and protection from an unknown vandal.

programme.title: Trip to Botswana
programme.desc: Zoe and Milo are frustrated looking for straws, and Alim responds only with clicking sounds. Alim then takes them to Botswana to meet Ketelelo, who shows them the San language, which uses clicking sounds, and how to handle a black mamba snake!

programme.title: Ebb's Rival
programme.desc: Joe, Flo's cousin arrives with Morris his show-off terrier. Grrrr. Morris shows off to everyone on the beach, but later gets so excited he makes a show-off mess. By comparison, Joe thinks Ebb is so cool. Things Couldn't Be better!

programme.title: The Spring
programme.desc: The well in the woods needs cleaning and protection from an unknown vandal.

programme.title: Field of Giants
programme.desc: Fontaine and Smiling Finn get stuck inside a closing giant clam as the pirates battle the Nektons for the pearl within!

programme.title: Fart Rocket!
programme.desc: Could farts power a rocket? And Gladiator Dynamite tests Dr Dan and Dr Raph's dunking skills in an epic Body Battle!

programme.title: Sacred Cat
programme.desc: Adored in Ancient Egypt, the cat was a real star. But being revered by the population was not exactly a walk in the park. Victims of their own success, cats were sometimes abused. But fortunately, some of them ended up landing on their feet.

programme.title: Alex Goulding and Jimmy Choi: Feats of Strength Duo
programme.desc: Ninja warrior Jimmy and fitness fanatic Alex reveal how they worked together to achieve the GUINNESS WORLD RECORDS title for the most consecutive double high-five push-ups! The powerful duo meets Aisheshek Magauina and shares what it takes to work as a team.

programme.title: How Do Ships Float?
programme.desc: Even in the middle of the ocean, you'll find mathematics at work, keeping boats afloat. So how can heavy metal ships float on water when a metal bar or a tiny coin sinks immediately? Over 2000 years ago in Ancient Greece, Archimedes came up with a convincing answer.

programme.title: Fart Rocket!
programme.desc: Could farts power a rocket? And Gladiator Dynamite tests Dr Dan and Dr Raph's dunking skills in an epic Body Battle!

programme.title: Tournie
programme.desc: Jesse, Julia and Ian host a tournament in the garage but turns out that they still have a lot to learn.

programme.title: Time After Time
programme.desc: When Darwin gets lost in his work, Newts comes up with a plan to help him keep track of time.

programme.title: International Cross-Strait Critics
programme.desc: The global situation is changing rapidly, and the interactions between the two sides of the Taiwan Strait and the four regions are frequent, with every action closely related. 'International Cross-Strait Critics' has different experts who will guide you from the superficial to the profound, helping you grasp the development context, deconstruct the major trends, and gain insights into new domains.

Jagadhatri E188
programme.desc: Jagaddhatri, a secret crime officer, and orphan Swayambhu partner to fight crime. Only a few friends know her real identity; later, they marry happily.

programme.title: Ganga Mai Ki Betiyan E243
programme.desc: Ganga Mai, abandoned for bearing daughters, defies norms with fierce love and dignity, raising three girls who each forge bold, individual paths shaped by their dreams and inner fire.

programme.title: Tumm Se Tumm Tak E313
programme.desc: Anu and Aryavardhan fall in love despite a big age gap. Facing family disapproval and challenges, they fight to show that real love knows no limits or rules.

programme.title: E3 - Mei Sheng's Tale
programme.desc: We follow 4 year old Mei Sheng a panda born in San Diego Zoo, California as he travels to Wolong, a natural homeland he's never known.

programme.title: E3 - Indigenous Weaving Made In Nantou Taiwan
programme.desc: In the modern world of technology advancement, hand crafts are of a diminishing sight.

programme.title: E2 - Hunting Priceless Relics
programme.desc: Investigators across Cambodia, Thailand, London and New York are on the hunt for evidence to reclaim ancient artefacts stolen by one of the most infamous art thieves.

programme.title: E4 - Morin Khuur Made In Ulaanbaatar, Mongolia
programme.desc: The Morin Khuur -- a two-stringed instrument with a carved horse head -- carries deep, resonant sound and stands as a proud symbol of Mongolian culture.

programme.title: E1 - The Cannon Of Kandy
programme.desc: The cannon of Kandy is an embellished artifact, taken as loot from Sri Lanka by the Dutch (VOC) during a war with the Kingdom of Kandy.

programme.desc: The cannon of Kandy is an embellished artifact, taken as loot from Sri Lanka by the Dutch (VOC) during a war with the Kingdom of Kandy.

programme.title: E4 - Morin Khuur Made In Ulaanbaatar, Mongolia
programme.desc: The Morin Khuur -- a two-stringed instrument with a carved horse head -- carries deep, resonant sound and stands as a proud symbol of Mongolian culture.

programme.title: E1 - The Cannon Of Kandy
programme.desc: The cannon of Kandy is an embellished artifact, taken as loot from Sri Lanka by the Dutch (VOC) during a war with the Kingdom of Kandy.

programme.title: Borneo - The Miraculous Forest
programme.desc: Seen from the sky, it is no more than a thin thread of forest, a tiny, fragile and fragmented strand that follows the river on either side.

programme.title: E3 - Mei Sheng's Tale
programme.desc: We follow 4 year old Mei Sheng a panda born in San Diego Zoo, California as he travels to Wolong, a natural homeland he's never known.

programme.title: E30
programme.desc: 潘岩(郭麒麟 飾)在機緣巧合下進入榮柯律所實習，認識了高冷女神左娜(金晨 飾)、學霸舒一南(晏紫東 飾)等一批年輕人。他們在資深前輩易帆(朱珠飾)、杜飛宇(張子賢飾)等人的帶領下，經歷了職場的波折坎坷和困難考驗，一起並肩作戰，互相學習成長，憑著熱情拼搏的職場精神，在情與法、義與利的境地裡突圍，更堅定了對法律的崇高信仰，同時也對自身的突破與飛躍有了新的認識與感悟，於職場和生活的路上守望初心，在平凡中創造不凡的「奮逗」故事。

programme.title: E33
programme.desc: 先天二年夏秋之交，天子雖已登基，但大長公主勢力更盛，長安局勢陰晴難定。盧凌風和蘇無名，奉命帶著由裴喜君、費雞師、櫻桃和薛環組成的探案小隊，以護送康國所獻金桃的名義重返長安。

programme.title: E33
programme.desc: 程家女名少商，因戰亂自幼被父母留在祖母身邊成為“留守兒童”，嬸孃狼心縱容，意圖將其養成廢人。面對重重陷阱，程少商（趙露思飾）為活命，假荒誕、真苦學，掩蓋鋒芒等待父母歸來。可撥開烏雲見月明時，卻因多年疏離致使親情已難再拾。缺愛的程少商，遇新帝義子凌不疑（吳磊飾）、白鹿山才子袁慎、世家子弟樓垚，三人各有優劣。在選擇適婚者上，程少商既自卑又務實，儘管情感之路頗多坎坷，但她從不後悔自己的每次選擇。在與凌不疑的相處之中，也陰差陽錯捲入了凌不疑的家庭與身世之謎中。種種事件，程少商屢立奇功，也從凌不疑的家庭關係中學會與父母相處之道，以及如何經營自己的愛情。同時程少商與凌不疑也在這些經歷中各自變化成長，慢慢與自己和家庭和解，並堅守內心的正義，攜手化解國家危機，成就一段佳話。

programme.title: E6
programme.desc: 《超時空羅曼史》講述了民國功夫巨星向秦羽，因一場意外來到21世紀，與十八線編劇金阿銀相遇，兩人展開了奇妙浪漫又充滿戲劇性的愛情故事。

programme.title: E34
programme.desc: 程家女名少商，因戰亂自幼被父母留在祖母身邊成為“留守兒童”，嬸孃狼心縱容，意圖將其養成廢人。面對重重陷阱，程少商（趙露思飾）為活命，假荒誕、真苦學，掩蓋鋒芒等待父母歸來。可撥開烏雲見月明時，卻因多年疏離致使親情已難再拾。缺愛的程少商，遇新帝義子凌不疑（吳磊飾）、白鹿山才子袁慎、世家子弟樓垚，三人各有優劣。在選擇適婚者上，程少商既自卑又務實，儘管情感之路頗多坎坷，但她從不後悔自己的每次選擇。在與凌不疑的相處之中，也陰差陽錯捲入了凌不疑的家庭與身世之謎中。種種事件，程少商屢立奇功，也從凌不疑的家庭關係中學會與父母相處之道，以及如何經營自己的愛情。同時程少商與凌不疑也在這些經歷中各自變化成長，慢慢與自己和家庭和解，並堅守內心的正義，攜手化解國家危機，成就一段佳話。

programme.title: E34
programme.desc: 先天二年夏秋之交，天子雖已登基，但大長公主勢力更盛，長安局勢陰晴難定。盧凌風和蘇無名，奉命帶著由裴喜君、費雞師、櫻桃和薛環組成的探案小隊，以護送康國所獻金桃的名義重返長安。

programme.title: E30
programme.desc: 潘岩(郭麒麟 飾)在機緣巧合下進入榮柯律所實習，認識了高冷女神左娜(金晨 飾)、學霸舒一南(晏紫東 飾)等一批年輕人。他們在資深前輩易帆(朱珠飾)、杜飛宇(張子賢飾)等人的帶領下，經歷了職場的波折坎坷和困難考驗，一起並肩作戰，互相學習成長，憑著熱情拼搏的職場精神，在情與法、義與利的境地裡突圍，更堅定了對法律的崇高信仰，同時也對自身的突破與飛躍有了新的認識與感悟，於職場和生活的路上守望初心，在平凡中創造不凡的「奮逗」故事。

E1 - Iceland: Fire
programme.desc: Learn about the world’s largest volcanic island, a lone and rugged place where steam escapes, water explodes, and new ground is born every day. See how fire and ice collide in a battle that makes this the most geologically powerful island on earth.

programme.title: E3 - Elephant Story
programme.desc: Once superabundant, African Elephant populations have declined drastically due to hunting. Get an in-depth look into the lives of the most powerful land mammals on the planet, and see what parks like Addo and Tembe are doing to preserve their future.

programme.title: E3 - Praying for Rain
programme.desc: Trail Anastasia as her herd splits to protect two precious elephant calves, while Kuleta retakes territory for her remaining cheetah cubs. Join wild dog Phoenix’s search for a new mate as the skies open up and rain begins to heal the parched land.

programme.title: E4 - The Inside Story
programme.desc: Look behind the scenes and meet the innovative teams working to preserve and protect Kenya’s wildlife. Check out Save the Elephants’ radio-tracking-collar system, a drone that monitors wild dog packs, and a local team of Maasai cheetah trackers.

programme.title: E1 - Iceland: Fire
programme.desc: Learn about the world’s largest volcanic island, a lone and rugged place where steam escapes, water explodes, and new ground is born every day. See how fire and ice collide in a battle that makes this the most geologically powerful island on earth.

programme.title: E3 - Elephant Story
programme.desc: Once superabundant, African Elephant populations have declined drastically due to hunting. Get an in-depth look into the lives of the most powerful land mammals on the planet, and see what parks like Addo and Tembe are doing to preserve their future.

programme.title: E2 - Rules of the Game
programme.desc: Young hyenas compete in tug of war, mischievous parrots play at picking apart tourists’ cars, and Atlantic spotted dolphins enjoy sophisticated social games amid seaweed—all following specific rules that hone social bonds.

programme.title: E3 - Lake Hunters
programme.desc: Sri Lanka’s lowlands are dotted with thousands of seemingly peaceful lakes, but don’t be fooled, this is the realm of the mugger crocodile. Muggers are hunters from day one. Watch as these supreme predators compete with each other in the fierce heat.

programme.title: E3 - Praying for Rain
programme.desc: Trail Anastasia as her herd splits to protect two precious elephant calves, while Kuleta retakes territory for her remaining cheetah cubs. Join wild dog Phoenix’s search for a new mate as the skies open up and rain begins to heal the parched land.

programme.title: E4 - The Inside Story
programme.desc: Look behind the scenes and meet the innovative teams working to preserve and protect Kenya’s wildlife. Check out Save the Elephants’ radio-tracking-collar system, a drone that monitors wild dog packs, and a local team of Maasai cheetah trackers.

programme.title: E5 - Pointy Bits
programme.desc: Avoid the swords, spikes, and deadly hood ornaments on these alpha hunters. Observe elands locking corkscrew horns, storks rattling sabre-shaped beaks, rhinos scaring the competition with massive horns, and striped marlins spearing unsuspecting prey.

programme.title: E3 - Praying for Rain
programme.desc: Trail Anastasia as her herd splits to protect two precious elephant calves, while Kuleta retakes territory for her remaining cheetah cubs. Join wild dog Phoenix’s search for a new mate as the skies open up and rain begins to heal the parched land.

programme.title: E4 - The Inside Story
programme.desc: Look behind the scenes and meet the innovative teams working to preserve and protect Kenya’s wildlife. Check out Save the Elephants’ radio-tracking-collar system, a drone that monitors wild dog packs, and a local team of Maasai cheetah trackers.

programme.title: E4 - The Karst Caves
programme.desc: Explore the stunning caves of Khammouane province in Laos. These natural wonders, squeezed between the Mekong River and the Annamite Range, are home to part-time and full-time residents, including bats, geckos, frogs, and giant centipedes.

programme.title: E2 - Kruger's Pafuri
programme.desc: In the northern reaches of the Kruger National Park, life depends on one thing – water. In a land burdened by heat and drought a single ribbon cuts its reliable course through the wilderness. It’s a lifeline to all creatures, great and small.

programme.title: E3 - Augrabies Falls
programme.desc: Augrabies is where the mighty Orange River plunges over the awesome 56 meter Augrabies waterfall. Derived from a word “oukurubes” which means “place of thunder” in the indigenous language of the Nama-Khoi this land is the heart of a harsh and sun-beaten world with flashes of brilliant color and a thunderous roar.

programme.title: E2 - Iceland: Ice
programme.desc: Tour an island built by volcanoes, but sculpted by ice. About 1.5 million years ago, a sheet of ice descended from the north and covered the land. Today, massive glaciers continue to carve marine cliffs and cut down mountains.

programme.title: E4 - Killer Packs
programme.desc: Surviving the African savanna requires guile and teamwork for species who live in packs. Follow a day in the life of African wild dogs and dwarf mongooses to see how they rely on their tight-knit families to overcome the challenging landscape.

Derived from a word “oukurubes” which means “place of thunder” in the indigenous language of the Nama-Khoi this land is the heart of a harsh and sun-beaten world with flashes of brilliant color and a thunderous roar.

programme.title: E2 - Iceland: Ice
programme.desc: Tour an island built by volcanoes, but sculpted by ice. About 1.5 million years ago, a sheet of ice descended from the north and covered the land. Today, massive glaciers continue to carve marine cliffs and cut down mountains.

programme.title: E4 - Killer Packs
programme.desc: Surviving the African savanna requires guile and teamwork for species who live in packs. Follow a day in the life of African wild dogs and dwarf mongooses to see how they rely on their tight-knit families to overcome the challenging landscape.

programme.title: E3 - Praying for Rain
programme.desc: Trail Anastasia as her herd splits to protect two precious elephant calves, while Kuleta retakes territory for her remaining cheetah cubs. Join wild dog Phoenix’s search for a new mate as the skies open up and rain begins to heal the parched land.

programme.title: E4 - The Inside Story
programme.desc: Look behind the scenes and meet the innovative teams working to preserve and protect Kenya’s wildlife. Check out Save the Elephants’ radio-tracking-collar system, a drone that monitors wild dog packs, and a local team of Maasai cheetah trackers.

programme.title: E4 - The Karst Caves
programme.desc: Explore the stunning caves of Khammouane province in Laos. These natural wonders, squeezed between the Mekong River and the Annamite Range, are home to part-time and full-time residents, including bats, geckos, frogs, and giant centipedes.

programme.title: E2 - Kruger's Pafuri
programme.desc: In the northern reaches of the Kruger National Park, life depends on one thing – water. In a land burdened by heat and drought a single ribbon cuts its reliable course through the wilderness. It’s a lifeline to all creatures, great and small.

programme.title: E1 - Iceland: Fire
programme.desc: Learn about the world’s largest volcanic island, a lone and rugged place where steam escapes, water explodes, and new ground is born every day. See how fire and ice collide in a battle that makes this the most geologically powerful island on earth.

programme.title: E2 - Iceland: Ice
programme.desc: Tour an island built by volcanoes, but sculpted by ice. About 1.5 million years ago, a sheet of ice descended from the north and covered the land. Today, massive glaciers continue to carve marine cliffs and cut down mountains.

programme.title: E3 - Elephant Story
programme.desc: Once superabundant, African Elephant populations have declined drastically due to hunting. Get an in-depth look into the lives of the most powerful land mammals on the planet, and see what parks like Addo and Tembe are doing to preserve their future.

programme.title: E4 - Killer Packs
programme.desc: Surviving the African savanna requires guile and teamwork for species who live in packs. Follow a day in the life of African wild dogs and dwarf mongooses to see how they rely on their tight-knit families to overcome the challenging landscape.

programme.title: E11 - Andree And Her Many Lives
programme.desc: Andree Fauchere is a leading figure in the region of Evolene. In the 1970s she became the first woman to manage a mountain hut in Switzerland. Since then she has lived a thousand different lives before concentrating on her current activity of herbalist.

programme.title: E17 - The Craze For Protein-Enriched Foods
programme.desc: We are seeing more and more processed products bearing labels such as ''high in protein'' or ''excellent source of protein.'' Do we really need all these foods? Also featured: titanium cutting boards; delicious Egyptian dishes; rougaille, a Mauritian speciality.

programme.title: E107
programme.desc: An interactive programme that's as fun as it is informative and reactive to the meteorological events of the moment. Reports from the regions and special subjects in the studio offer an easy way to better understand the impact weather has on health, nature, history and everyday life.

programme.title: E10 - The Brand By Vincent Pressiat
programme.desc: Fashion, design, gastronomy, lifestyle... Discover the world of French chic!

programme.title: E10 - Saint-Tropez Peninsula With Eric Canino
programme.desc: Michelin-star chef Eric Canino welcomes us to his restaurant La Voile in Ramatuelle and his hotel La Reserve, near Saint-Tropez. A great opportunity to rediscover the unique charms of coastal Provence and share his passion for local produce.

programme.title: E5 - Effects Of Climate Change On Indigenous Peoples
programme.desc: In Old Crow, how are Chief Dana Tizya-Tramm and his Gwich'in community facing climate warming and what can the rest of the world learn from their initiatives?

programme.title: E107
programme.desc: An interactive programme that's as fun as it is informative and reactive to the meteorological events of the moment. Reports from the regions and special subjects in the studio offer an easy way to better understand the impact weather has on health, nature, history and everyday life.

programme.title: E11 - Normandy By Arnaud Viel
programme.desc: Michelin-star chef Arnaud Viel has his feet firmly in bucolic Normandy, between the Orne and the Perche Regional Natural Reserve. The famous Percherons, camemberts, ciders and many other products come from this little-known region. Arnaud Viel reveals these gourmet delights to us.

programme.title: E8 - Clemence D'ennery/Juliette Clovis/Rabanne/Marion Mezenge

programme.title: The Current Affairs Documentary
programme.desc: The weekly half-hour program delivers in-depth reporting on topical political issues and newsworthy events. Revealing the story behind the stories, 'Close up' is informative, gripping and visually powerful.

programme.title: Never Say Die
programme.desc: Never Say Die follows Joey Delgado (Jillian Ward), a principled IT student who runs a vlog spotlighting the quiet heroism of honest police officers-inspired by her father, Major Julio Delgado (Raymart Santiago). Her views are challenged when a viral expose by Andrew Dizon (David Licauco), a sharp and cynical investigative vlogger, paints her father as corrupt and gets him suspended. The expose shatters the home she so carefully nurtured and blames Andrew.

programme.title: Family Feud
programme.desc: It features two families who compete to name the most popular answers to survey questions in order to win cash and prizes

programme.title: Fast Talk With Boy Abunda
programme.desc: The latest multi-platform showbiz news and talk show on Kapuso network.

programme.title: 24 Oras
programme.desc: Gives an up-to-the minute news here and around the world.

programme.title: The Secrets Of Hotel 88
programme.desc: It tells the story of three estranged brothers who discovered that they are part of the same family. And while they will inherit a hotel, they will also inherit its secrets. However, a rival family claims their rights on the land where the hotel stands, and a fight to take the hotel ensues, and the secrets that are kept starts to get uncovered.

programme.title: Apoy Sa Dugo
programme.desc: A psychological thriller and family-centered drama about sibling rivalry-where love for family can turn into obsession. However, a rival family claims their rights on the land where the hotel stands, and a fight to take the hotel ensues, and the secrets that are kept starts to get uncovered.

programme.title: It's Showtime
programme.desc: 'It's Showtime' is a hit variety program that thrives on spontaneity and animated conversations.

programme.title: Apoy Sa Dugo
programme.desc: A psychological thriller and family-centered drama about sibling rivalry-where love for family can turn into obsession. Bound by blood yet divided by choices, it's a gripping story of secrets, betrayal, and revenge-proving that sometimes, the deepest wounds come from the people you trust most.

programme.title: Never Say Die
programme.desc: Never Say Die follows Joey Delgado (Jillian Ward), a principled IT student who runs a vlog spotlighting the quiet heroism of honest police officers-inspired by her father, Major Julio Delgado (Raymart Santiago). Her views are challenged when a viral expose by Andrew Dizon (David Licauco), a sharp and cynical investigative vlogger, paints her father as corrupt and gets him suspended. The expose shatters the home she so carefully nurtured and blames Andrew.

programme.title: E17 - Tamika And The Beast
programme.desc: Adventures with music superstar Sunny Bridges and his class.

programme.title: E18 - Safety Last
programme.desc: When Li'l D inadvertently offends the participants in the annual Five Points Renaissance Fair the Rennies lay siege to Westley and destroy the school's auditorium. With nowhere to stage their musical production of Rapunzel (in which Eddie will play the lead) the kids ask Eddie to convince his parents to pay for the repairs. However upon hearing about the dangerous way in which the auditorium was destroyed Eddie's parents become unreasonably overprotective of their son to the point where Eddie must decide between quitting the musical or standing up to his parents.

programme.title: E26 - The Charm Offensive
programme.desc: After Ben gets too much publicity for his alien-antics in Fort Knox, a jealous Gwen feels unappreciated and looks to ease her pain with ice cream. She is soon confronted by Charmcaster.

programme.desc: Gazpacho and Chowder try to find a way to stand up to a customer.

programme.title: US Squawk Box
programme.desc: “Squawk Box” is the ultimate pre-market morning news and talk program, where the biggest names in business and politics tell their most important stories. Anchored by Joe Kernen, Becky Quick and Andrew Ross Sorkin, the show brings Wall Street to Main Street. It's a must-see for everyone from the professional trader to the casual investor.

programme.title: Money Movers
programme.desc: “Money Movers” provides investors with real-time analysis of the stories and the people attracting the attention of the markets each day. Capturing the energy of day's early trading, the program includes the breaking news and numbers driving stocks and sectors, helping investors make critical decisions. “Money Movers” anchors speak with the CEOs, government decision-makers and newsmakers who play a relevant role in how money is moving.

programme.title: Closing Bell: Overtime
programme.desc: When the bell rings, the action does not end. “Closing Bell: Overtime” takes you through all of the after-hours moves including breaking news, corporate earnings and post-market trading. programme.title: Money Movers

programme.title: Closing Bell: Overtime
programme.desc: When the bell rings, the action does not end. “Closing Bell: Overtime” takes you through all of the after-hours moves including breaking news, corporate earnings and post-market trading. programme.title: The Secrets Of Hotel 88[Live]
programme.desc: Two estranged families reunite at the reopening of Hotel 88, until the former bestfriends behind it are found dead. Forced to share the inheritance, their children uncover buried secrets and the truth behind their father's mysterious deaths.

programme.title: It's Showtime[Live]
programme.desc: The venue for Pinoys to strut and display their unique talents for all the world to see. Led by a powerhouse cast of popular celebrities - Vhong Navarro, Anne Curtis, Ogie Alcasid, Karylle, Jhong Hilario and Vice Ganda to name a few.

programme.title: Goin' Bulilit S15[Live]
programme.desc: A gag show with child actors playing adult roles, doing gags, sketches and segments. Instead of playing roles based on their own age, child actors are made to portray adult characters like Doctors, Teachers, Married Couples, etc.

programme.title: Linlang
programme.desc: Victor Lualhati, a former boxer turned seaman, discovers signs of his wife Juliana's infidelity and begins a personal investigation. As he digs deeper, Victor uncovers a web of deception involving powerful figures and family secrets, realizing that the affair is only part of a much larger and more dangerous conspiracy.

programme.title: Kung Mangarap Ka't Magising
programme.desc: Set in Baguio, the film follows Joey, a musically inclined college student adrift after personal loss. programme.desc: Victor Lualhati, a former boxer turned seaman, discovers signs of his wife Juliana's infidelity and begins a personal investigation. As he digs deeper, Victor uncovers a web of deception involving powerful figures and family secrets, realizing that the affair is only part of a much larger and more dangerous conspiracy.

programme.title: The Secrets Of Hotel 88[Live]
programme.desc: Two estranged families reunite at the reopening of Hotel 88, until the former bestfriends behind it are found dead. Forced to share the inheritance, their children uncover buried secrets and the truth behind their father's mysterious deaths.

programme.title: It's Showtime[Live]
programme.desc: The venue for Pinoys to strut and display their unique talents for all the world to see. Led by a powerhouse cast of popular celebrities - Vhong Navarro, Anne Curtis, Ogie Alcasid, Karylle, Jhong Hilario and Vice Ganda to name a few.

programme.title: E92 - Kiki's Pizza Service Delivery/Monster Reunion
programme.desc: Steven saves Kiki from some delicious nightmares.

programme.title: E6 - B. Shirley the Medium/McPherson Phantom/The Ride of the Valkyries/Scuba-Scuba Doo/Jou
programme.desc: While digging in search of his lost yo-yo, Courage finds a locked box that once belonged to Eustace's decreased brother, Horst. Believing the box contains his brother's money, Eustace tries to open it and fails. Seeking help.

programme.title: E7 - Scary Tales/Spoooooky Game
programme.desc: Unikitty and the gang tell spooky, scary and silly stories during their Halloween party.

programme.title: E8 - A. Entering and Breaking/Franken Kitty
programme.desc: When Rick leaves Spike in charge of protecting the house against burglars, Spike steps up and trains Tom and Jerry to be his helpers. At first it seems like they are going to fumble their security jobs, but then a burglar proves to be no match for our destructive trio.

programme.title: E168 - Permanent Record/Bbrae: Pt 1/Bbrae: Pt 2/Titan Saving Time/The Gold Standard
programme.desc: It's back to school as the Titans teach each other about science and grammar.

programme.title: E4 - Caffeinated Concert Tickets/Appreciation Day/Bet To Be Blonde/A Bunch Of Full Grown G
programme.desc: Mordecai and Rigby work overtime in order to get tickets to a Fist Pump concert. While working, they drink lots of coffee to keep them active.

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: 千金小姐林夏不幸被贅婿葉冬設局陷害，不僅失明、父親亦遭毒手。她在重見光明後，看穿了丈夫覬覦家產的邪惡真面目；為了奪回一切並揭開真相，林夏決定改頭換面，以全新身份潛入舊日世界，向渣男與同夥展開一步步毫不留情的復仇。

programme.title: E2 - 制服帥哥天團 上演顏值暴擊
programme.desc: 由吳彥祖擔任「風華投資人」，集結井朧、代旭、沙一汀、周柯宇、常華森、董思成、謝依霖等常駐嘉賓，在杭州西湖邊的青春潮飲生活店，共同完成15天的運營任務，探索興趣社交的潮流生活方式。

programme.title: E7 - 陳星旭回歸 全員變魔丸
programme.desc: 由劉宇寧、龔俊、孫紅雷、李乃文、陳赫、陳星旭、王玉雯、歐陽娣娣組成爆笑「地球團」，沿著地球脈絡從中國出發，感受北緯40度的煙火氣，通過遊戲任務解鎖各地文化與美食，用新鮮有趣的方式，探索全世界的同頻快樂。

programme.title: E42 - 人氣女生季菁遇上Mr.Right
programme.desc: 《非誠勿擾》全新改版，24位女嘉賓分為心動區和觀察區，男嘉賓暫不亮相，在「第二現場」與女嘉賓隔空對話。男女嘉賓通過雙向選擇，決定兩人能否成功牽手。

programme.desc: A reality program that gives recognition to the most deserving and most hardworking Filipinos who toil through each day in order to earn a decent living for their families. programme.title: E14
programme.desc: 高中畢業出身會計師張浩宇面對大型會計師事務所的不正之風，以最不像會計師的方式實現正義。

programme.title: E12
programme.desc: 當紅主播許妍（趙露思飾）和都會精英沈皓明（陳偉霆飾）是一對人人艷羨慕的夫妻，看似十分般配的兩人，由於出生環境的差異，始終難以融入對方的圈子。許妍靠著光鮮的主持人身分和「精心裝點」的身世順利和沈皓明步入婚姻，而這一切盡在沈皓明的掌握下。衝突來臨，許妍脫離沈皓明的掌控一去不回頭。沈皓明卻發現自己早已陷入愛情，想要全力追回許妍。經歷種種，兩人終於撕掉外表的偽裝，重新靠近，會見彼此的內在，也重新認識自己。

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: 一位正直的明星律師兼忠實粉絲，在偶像被指控謀殺後挺身而出，為他辯護。「孟世娜」是擁有豐富經歷的刑事辯護律師，同時是偶像團體Gold Boys的十年以上的忠實粉絲。在Gold Boys的主唱「都來益」因捲入殺人事件而成為嫌疑人時，她隱藏了自己的崇拜之情，為他辯護，並揭示了一個意想不到的真相。

programme.title: E14
programme.desc: 高中畢業出身會計師張浩宇面對大型會計師事務所的不正之風，以最不像會計師的方式實現正義。

programme.title: E9
programme.desc: 二百年後兩個神祕的女人，突然出現在超級富有的丹氏家族，沒人知道她們是誰。但隨後這兩位女子意識到，在前世她們與丹氏家族的每位成員，都有着密不可分的關係。

programme.title: E12
programme.desc: 當紅主播許妍（趙露思飾）和都會精英沈皓明（陳偉霆飾）是一對人人艷羨慕的夫妻，看似十分般配的兩人，由於出生環境的差異，始終難以融入對方的圈子。許妍靠著光鮮的主持人身分和「精心裝點」的身世順利和沈皓明步入婚姻，而這一切盡在沈皓明的掌握下。衝突來臨，許妍脫離沈皓明的掌控一去不回頭。沈皓明卻發現自己早已陷入愛情，想要全力追回許妍。經歷種種，兩人終於撕掉外表的偽裝，重新靠近，會見彼此的內在，也重新認識自己。

programme.desc: 當紅主播許妍（趙露思飾）和都會精英沈皓明（陳偉霆飾）是一對人人艷羨慕的夫妻，看似十分般配的兩人，由於出生環境的差異，始終難以融入對方的圈子。許妍靠著光鮮的主持人身分和「精心裝點」的身世順利和沈皓明步入婚姻，而這一切盡在沈皓明的掌握下。衝突來臨，許妍脫離沈皓明的掌控一去不回頭。沈皓明卻發現自己早已陷入愛情，想要全力追回許妍。經歷種種，兩人終於撕掉外表的偽裝，重新靠近，會見彼此的內在，也重新認識自己。

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: 一位正直的明星律師兼忠實粉絲，在偶像被指控謀殺後挺身而出，為他辯護。「孟世娜」是擁有豐富經歷的刑事辯護律師，同時是偶像團體Gold Boys的十年以上的忠實粉絲。在Gold Boys的主唱「都來益」因捲入殺人事件而成為嫌疑人時，她隱藏了自己的崇拜之情，為他辯護，並揭示了一個意想不到的真相。

programme.title: E41 - Jeans
programme.desc: Watches, speakers, toilets... Maestro takes a fascinating look at some of our most everyday objects, both old and new. How exactly to they work? What is their history?

programme.title: E19 - Here's A Hyena
programme.desc: At 6 years old the cheerful mischievous Koumi dreams of knowing all the animals in the world. Thanks to her picture book, she's able to head off and meet them.

programme.title: E19
programme.desc: In each episode, an animal from the African continent is highlighted in song.

programme.title: Oscar ET Malika, Toujours En Retard S3
programme.desc: Oscar and Malika walk to school together. Every morning, they face funny, absurd or ridiculous situations and live improbable adventures.

programme.title: Un Si Grand Soleil S7
programme.desc: The Bastide, Estrela, Salama, Levy, Berville and Alami families, plus a host of supporting characters, live and work in the modern everyday city of Montpellier, in southern France. Between romance and crime thriller, with a blend of comic and serious themes, their stories weave a fascinating web.

programme.title: Meurtres En Perigord Vert
programme.desc: In Perigord, Isabelle Maurin, recently crowned Queen of Araucania, is found decapitated in the garden of the chateau she has just inherited. This is not the first murder linked to this family. Emma Lambert, a young police lieutenant from Bordeaux, conducts the investigation with Sacha Besson, a lieutenant of the local gendarmerie.

programme.title: E8 - Clemence D'ennery/Juliette Clovis/Rabanne/Marion Mezenge
programme.desc: Clemence d'Ennery unveils her collection of Asian works in a Paris hotel. Using porcelain petals, Juliette Clovis opens up a luminous, dreamlike world. At Rabanne, we push the boundaries of women's dressing with bold materials. Immerse yourself in the studio of artist Marion Mezenge.

programme.title: E14 - The Winter Monster
programme.desc: Edmond the squirrel and Lucy the bear cub grew up together. They live in a majestic chestnut tree in the heart of the forest. With their friends they solve riddles and live thrilling adventures, with every day bringing new wonders to discover in the natural world around them.

programme.title: E6 - Go Away Alfred!
programme.desc: Four best friends have a secret: after school, they climb up to their hidden tree house. It contains a priceless treasure: books! Each day, the children tell one another stories, travelling to exciting fairy-tale worlds.

programme.title: E4 - Simple Time-Savers
programme.desc: Mary surprises Lorraine Kelly on the set of her show to teach her and daughter Rosie some delicious time-saving recipes, including a fragrant Thai-style beef stir-fry and sea bream with samphire.

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: Jamie's got a genius way to cook chicken for the crispiest skin ever, and a seriously simple pie with the easiest dough you'll ever make. Two delicious dishes ideal for when you need to get food - and flavour - on the table, fast. And there's more: a treat from the Godfather of Spanish cuisine, Jose Pizarro, who shares some gorgeous Mediterranean flavours using just 5 everyday ingredients.

programme.title: E608 - Blast From The Past
programme.desc: Rick tries not to slip up when making a deal on a pair of snowshoes used in World War II. Then, Rick and Corey get a blast from the past when they go see a hand cannon from the 1600s.

programme.title: 1942: Philippine Resistance: Refusal To Surrender
programme.desc: Gen MacArthur famously promised that 'I shall return' before retreating but this was possible only with Filipino guerrillas bravely fighting on.

programme.title: E25 - Gardner Museum Robbery
programme.desc: Thieves steal half a billion dollars in masterpieces from the Gardner Museum. An exhaustive search has failed to recover the stolen goods. Who orchestrated the biggest art heist in history and why?

programme.title: E1 - Curse Of The Carrier
programme.desc: The team dives in search of an A3 Skywarrior attack aircraft that was lost in a suspicious disaster off the USS Saratoga aircraft carrier in 1960. The Saratoga lost eight men on this single mission.

programme.title: E1 - Gator War
programme.desc: It is an all-out Gator War as hunters battle head-to-head in a competition to win 350 new alligator tags at the end of the season. Troy aims to get an early lead.

programme.title: Freedom Run
programme.desc: Te-pei sets up an Angel's Dust scan but finds himself trapped by Hong Kong police led by Chang. They are ordered to cooperate to crack the narcotize ring and suspect rich Chen as the kingpin. This leads to a Yunan martial arts troupe. Chang falls in love with the troupe's star, Hung. Police raid the troupe but find nothing as Hung has unwittingly taken the narcotics. She wants to smuggle herself to America, only to find herself chased by police and traffickers...

programme.title: Brief Encounter In Shinjuku
programme.desc: Foon, a Public Relations manager, starts a happy life with his wife Ann after remarrying her. Kwan, a new public relation officer in Foon's department, falls in love with Foon after he shields her from being criticized, when there is friction between Foon and Ann. Thus Foon falls in love with Kwan gradually. After a business trip to Tokyo, their relationship becomes much closer, while Ann meets Chu, a councilor, who falls in love with her but can't get Ann's response. When returning to Hong Kong, Kwan doesn't want to destroy Foon's family and decides to marry her fianc? When Foon is depressed by this, Ann finds out the truth. Another rupture breaks out again.
